## Deposit not credited after 48 hours and limited communication
I transferred 280 USDT to my Karta account and the transaction was successfully confirmed on the blockchain.

After contacting support, I was first directed through an AI chatbot and then escalated to a human agent. I was informed that their provider was undergoing unscheduled maintenance and that top-ups and transactions were affected.

The issue is that my funds remain unavailable, and I have not been provided with a clear resolution timeline. I rely on these funds for payments, and the lack of transparency regarding when the service will be restored has been frustrating. [...] Nov 13, 2025

Image 34: Rated 3 out of 5 stars

## Verification is pain
Verification is such a pain! I’m a new user and started getting ads from Facebook, so I decided to sign up. But I accidentally registered on the wrong site — I went to app.karta.io instead of personal.karta.io. After verifying everything, I somehow ended up in business mode, which I don’t want. 

Then, I went to personal.karta.io, which redirected me to a Telegram bot. From there, they asked me to verify again — but this time, I got an error saying my profile is “another profile.” What?? Even with the same phone number, they can’t figure it out? 

To make things worse, there’s no option to delete my account on app.karta.io, and now I can’t even use personal Karta. The whole process is super confusing. Help!!

results.content:
Oct 7, 2025

Image 28: Rated 1 out of 5 stars

## Absolutely horrible to use
Signing up for a fund took me about 3 hours and a screenshare with my accountant. It seems to be set up for a very specific kind of company. Many of the required fields didn't make sense for my structure. I've had to put placeholder/best-effort docs in many places. I would have bounced if the fund wasn't run by a friend of mine.

The app itself is also a broken piece of trash. It constantly crashed and I had to upload the same documents about 10 times because it keeps losing them.

UI looks pretty clean though so good job to their designer :-)

October 7, 2025

results.title: Introduction to CartAI
results.content:
With CartAI, your platform owns the transaction. You apply the coupon, calculate the cashback, and complete the checkout — all inside your product. No redirect means no attribution loss, no broken coupon codes, and no user drop-off at the merchant's checkout.

Example integration: A cashback platform identifies the best price for a specific product across five retailers. The user selects the best deal. CartAI completes the checkout on the winning retailer's site, applies any available coupon, and records the exact order total for cashback calculation — all without the user ever seeing the retailer's checkout page.

### 4. Editorial & Content Platforms

> Turn every product mention into a shoppable moment. [...] > From AI recommendation to confirmed purchase in a single interaction.

Vertical AI apps — personal stylists, interior design assistants, beauty advisors, car configurators — generate highly personalised product recommendations. But they consistently fail at the last step: sending the user away to buy. The handoff breaks the experience and kills conversion.

CartAI closes that gap. When your AI recommends a sofa, a skincare routine, or a specific laptop model, the user can purchase every item in that recommendation directly inside your app. CartAI handles multi-SKU, multi-merchant checkouts in parallel — so a full outfit recommendation across five brands becomes a single "Buy All" action with one confirmation. [...] Example integration: A fashion AI app generates a weekly outfit for the user across three brands. The user reviews the full look and taps "Buy All." CartAI creates three parallel checkout tasks, handles each merchant's checkout independently, and returns a single unified order summary.

### 3. Coupon, Cashback, Loyalty & Price Comparison Platforms

> Apply the reward and complete the purchase — in one place.

Cashback and loyalty platforms have always faced the same problem: they can track a purchase after the redirect, but they can't control the checkout. Coupon codes fail at the merchant. Cashback tracking breaks. The user abandons mid-checkout on the retailer's site and the platform takes the blame.

## Employees
Manil Uppal (N/A):  Kunal Mestri (N/A):  Aman Gupta (N/A):  Chaitanya Thombare (N/A): [...] CartAI is a developer-first API that fuses browser automation and payments — deploying a specialized AI agent to navigate any web property and complete the transaction at the end of it. Checkouts, subscriptions, invoices, orders — anywhere a workflow has to transact, CartAI completes it. Built for three modes: automate existing transactional processes, embed transactions into new applications, or enable transactions on surfaces that never had them. Engineered with composable workflows, a PCI-compliant payment stack with credit card intake, vaulting, and agentic protocol support, and cooperative bot-mitigation that works alongside Cloudflare, Skyfire KYA, Human, Fingerprint, and Web Bot Auth — so transactions clear cleanly instead of being flagged.
